metadata.title: YOUR META TITLE — max 60 chars, include primary keyword
metadata.description: Your meta description — 140 to 160 characters, written to earn a click.

author.name: Bradley A. Pistotnik (Trial Lawyer)
author.bio: Brad Pistotnik is the CEO of Bull Attorneys®, P.A. and a Kansas trucking and personal injury lawyer with over 45 years of experience. He focuses on serious injury and truck accident cases involving DOT regulations and commercial vehicle safety standards.

sections.heading: INTRODUCTION
content: Second paragraph — each paragraph is a separate string.

sections.heading: SECTION WITH AN IMAGE
content: This section will display an image alongside the content. Set hasImage to true and set imageIndex to match the position of the image in the images array at the bottom of this file (0 = first image, 1 = second, etc.).

sections.heading: FINAL SECTION — optional Learn More button
